## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and its scope.

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] `python -m ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `python -m ruff format --check src tests`
- [ ] `python -m mypy src/adaptive_surrogate`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`

## Scientific and API claims

- [ ] Documentation does not overstate uncertainty, inverse-design, or scientific guarantees.
